strengths: Successfully completed all required phases including loop introduction, positioning, and tail cutting
Demonstrated good instrument coordination during pusher advancement
Maintained adequate working speed with completion under two minutes
weaknesses: Loop placement was off the target mark, resulting in penalty deduction
Inconsistent precision in final positioning before securing the loop
Could improve mark-centering accuracy during the positioning phase

drills.name: Mark-centering drill
drills.description: Place the loop at the target mark, pause, and verify alignment before cinching. Repeat 15 times with deliberate visual confirmation.
drills.targets_weakness: Loop placement was off the target mark.

drills.name: Loop opening and parking
drills.description: Practice opening the loop and parking it around the target appendage at the exact mark before tightening. Focus on precise positioning.
drills.targets_weakness: Inconsistent precision in final positioning before securing.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your consistent completion ability into precise mark placement. Your speed is adequate, now prioritize accuracy to eliminate penalty deductions.
